input.text:
"""Agent Engine Service main application."""

import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

# Optional shared imports for Docker compatibility
try:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent))
    from shared.errors import setup_exception_handlers
    HAS_SHARED_ERRORS = True
except ImportError:
    HAS_SHARED_ERRORS = False
    setup_exception_handlers = None

from . import models  # ensure models are registered
from .db import Base, engine
from .routers import router, tools_router, safety_router
from .settings_routes import router as settings_router
from .routers_autonomy import get_all_autonomy_routers
from .routers_autonomous import router as autonomous_router
from .routers_orchestration import router as orchestration_router
from .routers_advanced import router as advanced_router
from .routers_execution import router as execution_router
from .routers_max_autonomy import router as max_autonomy_router
from .routers_ultimate import router as ultimate_router
from .routers_full_autonomy import router as full_autonomy_router
from .routers_billing import router as billing_router
from .routers_teams import router as teams_router
from . import models_billing  # ensure billing models are registered

# Initialize OpenTelemetry tracing
try:
    from shared.observability.tracing import init_tracing
    tracer = init_tracing(
        service_name="agent-engine",
        otlp_endpoint=os.getenv("OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT"),
        enable_console=os.getenv("OTEL_CONSOLE_EXPORT", "").lower() == "true",
    )
except (ImportError, NameError, Exception):
    tracer = None

app = FastAPI(
    title="Agent Engine Service",
    description="Autonomous AI agent execution with safety controls",
    version="0.1.0",
)

# Setup standardized exception handlers
if HAS_SHARED_ERRORS and setup_exception_handlers:
    setup_exception_handlers(app)

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)


@app.on_event("startup")
async def on_startup() -> None:
    async with engine.begin() as conn:
        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)
    
    # AUTO-START FULL AUTONOMY if enabled
    if os.getenv("AUTO_START_AUTONOMY", "true").lower() == "true":
        from .auto_startup import auto_startup
        await auto_startup()


@app.on_event("shutdown")
async def on_shutdown() -> None:
    from .auto_startup import auto_shutdown
    await auto_shutdown()


# Include sub-routers FIRST to ensure specific paths match before catch-all patterns
app.include_router(settings_router)  # /agents/settings/* - migrated from auth service
app.include_router(tools_router)
app.include_router(safety_router)
app.include_router(router)

# Include autonomy routers for dual-mode system
for autonomy_router in get_all_autonomy_routers():
    app.include_router(autonomy_router)

# Include autonomous agent router (self-triggering, parallel communication)
app.include_router(autonomous_router)

# Include orchestration router (multi-agent coordination, swarms, blockchain integration)
app.include_router(orchestration_router)

# Include advanced router (goal decomposition, memory, learning, self-improvement)
app.include_router(advanced_router)

# Include execution router (task execution, reasoning, collaboration)
app.include_router(execution_router)

# Include max autonomy router (goal pursuit, resilience, proactive behavior, personality)
app.include_router(max_autonomy_router)

# Include ultimate router (consciousness, emergent intelligence, world model)
app.include_router(ultimate_router)

# Include full autonomy router (THE MOST IMPORTANT - complete autonomous operation)
app.include_router(full_autonomy_router)

# Include billing router (usage tracking, subscriptions, payments)
app.include_router(billing_router)

# Include teams router (agent teams, NFT, marketplace, rentals)
app.include_router(teams_router)


@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {"service": "agent_engine", "version": "0.1.0"}


@app.get("/health")
async def health():
    return {"status": "ok"}
